title: Organic fertilizer from anaerobic digestate and stabilized liquid fish product
abstract: A process for production of anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer includes combining anaerobic digestate and one or more stabilized liquid fish products to create a combination of anaerobic digestate and one or more stabilized liquid fish products. The combination of anaerobic digestate and one or more stabilized liquid fish products is processed to yield the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. An anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product comprising a combination of anaerobic digestate and one or more stabilized liquid fish products. 2. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 1, wherein the anaerobic digestate is a by-product of anaerobic digestion of waste products. 3. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 1, further comprising one or more additives. 4. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 3, wherein one of the one or more additives is concentrated separator by-product. 5. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 3, wherein one of the one or more additives is betaine. 6. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 1, wherein the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product is 10% to 90% anaerobic digestate. 7. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 1, wherein the one or more stabilized liquid fish products includes one or more liquid fish products treated with sulfuric acid, citric acid, and/or phosphoric acid. 8. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 1, wherein the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products includes a nitrogen content in a range of 1 to 10 percent. 9. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 1, wherein the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products includes a phosphate content in a range of 0.5 to 2.5 percent. 10. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 1, wherein the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products includes a potassium content in a range of 1 to 7 percent. 11. A process of manufacturing an anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product comprising: obtaining a quantity of anaerobic digestate; obtaining a quantity of one or more stabilized liquid fish products; and combining at least part of the quantity of the anaerobic digestate and at least part of the quantity of the one or more stabilized liquid fish products to yield a combination of anaerobic digestate and one or more stabilized liquid fish products, the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products comprising the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product. 12. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, wherein the anaerobic digestate is a by-product of anaerobic digestion of waste products. 13. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, further comprising: obtaining a quantity of one or more additives; and combining at least part of the quantity of the anaerobic digestate, at least part of the quantity of the one or more stabilized liquid fish products, and at least part of the quantity of the one or more additives to yield a combination of anaerobic digestate, one or more stabilized liquid fish products, and one or more additives, the combination of the anaerobic digestate, the one or more stabilized liquid fish products, and the one or more additives comprising the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product. 14. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 13, wherein one of the one or more additives is concentrated separator byproduct. 15. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 13, wherein one of the one or more additives is betaine. 16. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, wherein the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products is 10% to 90% anaerobic digestate. 17. The anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, wherein the one or more stabilized liquid fish products includes one or more liquid fish products treated with sulfuric acid, citric acid, and/or phosphoric acid. 18. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, further comprising: filtering at least a part of the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products using a filter having a standard wire mesh size number of 200. 19. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, further comprising: filtering at least a part of the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products using a filter having a standard wire mesh size number in a range of 50 to 200. 20. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, further comprising: heat-treating the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products to yield a heat-treated combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products; and cooling the heat-treated combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products to yield the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product. 21. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 20, wherein heat-treating the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products to yield the heat-treated combination of the anaerobic 

 digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products comprises heating the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products to 130 degrees F. 22. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 20, further comprising: filtering at least a portion of the heat-treated combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products using a filter having a standard wire size number in a range of 50 to 200. 23. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, wherein the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product includes a nitrogen content in a range of 1 to 10 percent. 24. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, wherein the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product includes a phosphate content in a range of 0.5 to 2.5 percent. 25. The process of manufacturing the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product of Claim 11, wherein the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product includes a potassium content in a range of 1 to 7 percent. 26. A process for fertilization comprising: obtaining a quantity of anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product, wherein the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product includes a combination of anaerobic digestate and one or more stabilized liquid fish products; and applying the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product to agricultural vegetation. 27. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein the anaerobic digestate is a byproduct of anaerobic digestion of waste products. 28. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products further comprises one or more additives. 29. The process for fertilization of Claim 28, wherein one of the one or more additives is concentrated separator by-product. 30. The process for fertilization of Claim 28, wherein one of the one or more additives is betaine. 31. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product is 10% to 90% anaerobic digestate. 32. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein the one or more stabilized liquid fish products includes one or more liquid fish products treated with sulfuric acid, citric acid, and/or phosphoric acid. 33. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products includes a nitrogen content in a range of 1 to 10 percent. 34. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products includes a phosphate content in a range of 0.5 to 2.5 percent. 35. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein the combination of the anaerobic digestate and the one or more stabilized liquid fish products includes a potassium content in a range of 1 to 7 percent. 36. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein applying the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product to the agricultural vegetation comprises applying the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product at a rate of 5 to 4000 gallons per acre. 37. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein applying the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product to the agricultural vegetation comprises applying/adding the 

 anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product directly to the agricultural vegetation and/or fields and/or soil and/or substrate supporting the agricultural vegetation. 38. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein applying the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product to the agricultural vegetation comprises applying/adding the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product to an irrigation system servicing the agricultural vegetation. 39. The process for fertilization of Claim 26, wherein applying the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product to the agricultural vegetation comprises adding the anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product to a liquid base to obtain a desired concentration of anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product. 40. The process for fertilization of Claim 39 wherein the desired concentration of anaerobic digestate based organic fertilizer product is 10% to 90%.
